title: Angular Gausslets
summary: Gausslets are one of the few basis constructions for electronic structure that combine locality, orthonormality, variable resolution, and an accurate diagonal approximation for the electron-electron interaction, but the original construction is tied to one dimension. Radial gausslets extended this idea to atoms while leaving the angular degrees of freedom in spherical harmonics, so the atomic interaction remained only partially diagonal in the combined basis. Here we introduce generalized gausslets on the sphere and combine them shell by shell with radial gausslets to form an atom-centered basis in which the electron-electron interaction takes a two-index integral-diagonal form. The angular basis starts from localized spherical Gaussians and uses injection to make a low-$\ell$ spherical-harmonic subspace exact. Tests of the kinetic spectrum, low-$\ell$ Coulomb matrix elements, spherium, first-row Hartree--Fock calculations, and He exact diagonalization show systematic convergence with increasing angular resolution. We also develop DMRG methods for this basis, including compact MPOs, correlated small-space starting states, Givens-rotation transfers between nearby angular sizes, and embedded sampled variance extrapolation (ESVE). We show that this combination of ingredients can be used to solve the Be atom, with extrapolations in the number of angular functions but with fixed radial resolution, to within about 0.1 mH of the complete basis set limit exact energy. This shows that DMRG calculations of first row atoms which include both static and accurate dynamic correlation on the same footing are feasible.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了广义球面高斯子（generalized gausslets on the sphere），与径向高斯子结合形成以原子为中心的基组，使得电子-电子相互作用呈现双指标积分对角形式。基于该基组开发了DMRG方法，通过对Be原子的计算表明，在固定径向分辨率下外推角动量，可达到约0.1 mH精度，首次实现了在同一基组中同时处理静态和动态关联的DMRG计算。
AI.motivation: 原有的高斯子（gausslets）仅适用于一维，而径向高斯子虽拓展到原子体系，但由于角向依赖球谐函数，电子-电子相互作用在组合基组中仅部分对角化。为了在原子中心基组中实现电子-电子相互作用的完全双指标积分对角形式，需要构建球面上的广义高斯子。
AI.method: 1. 从局部球面高斯函数出发，通过注入（injection）方法构造精确的低ℓ球谐子空间。2. 将球面高斯子与径向高斯子逐层结合，形成原子中心基组。3. 开发了配套的DMRG方法，包括紧凑MPO、关联小空间起始态、Givens旋转在邻近角大小之间的转移、以及嵌入式采样方差外推（ESVE）。
AI.result: 在动力学谱、低ℓ库仑矩阵元、球面二电子体系（spherium）、第一行元素的Hartree-Fock计算以及He精确对角化等测试中，系统验证了随角分辨率提高的收敛性。对Be原子，在固定径向分辨率下通过角动量外推，达到约0.1 mH的完全基组极限精度。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明了在DMRG计算中，使用同一基组同时处理静态和动态关联对第一行原子是可行的，为更精确的电子结构计算奠定了基础。

title: On Electropolymerized Fingerprints and their Potential for Identification and Encryption
summary: While human technology is ruled by determinism, biological systems exploit a subtle balance of control and stochasticity. This balance, evident in the morphogenesis of textural patterns imprinted on leaves, fur or skin can help hierarchize organisms both as a representative of their species and as unique individuals. In this study, we identified that, by exploiting electrochemistry, it is possible to generate such versatile but specific textures, to imprint patterns of a conducting polymer on a conducting substrate. It is shown that the 1D morphogenesis of conducting polymer dendrites on wires translates, on 2D surfaces, as highly heterogeneous coatings of dark spots, rosettes or marbled patterns. Despite their inherent stochasticity, these patterns are characteristic of the physical conditions they grew in, and particularly of the chemical content of the electroactive solution used for their electropolymerization. A statistical study demonstrates that these patterns could be used as fingerprints to physically tag the identity of a solution within a specific class. By the identification of a new electrochemical process which allows generating physical fingerprints with optical, electrical and chemical contrast on an electrode, this research paves the way toward a disruptive low-cost technology which could allow any end-user to generate personal tags on a glass slide or on a micro-chip, to engrave physically-encrypted personal information for various applications.

AI.tldr: 本文发现通过电化学方法可以在导电基底上生成类似生物纹理的随机但特征性的图案，这些图案可作为溶液的物理指纹，用于低成本的身份加密标记技术。
AI.motivation: 受生物系统中决定论与随机性平衡的启发（如叶片、皮毛、皮肤上的纹理图案），研究者希望利用电化学方法在人造材料上复现这种兼具物种代表性与个体独特性的图案生成机制。
AI.method: 利用导电聚合物的电聚合过程，在二维表面上生长出一维枝晶形态的异质涂层，产生暗点、玫瑰花结或大理石纹等图案。通过统计分析验证图案与电化学溶液化学含量的对应关系。
AI.result: 图案虽具有随机性，但高度依赖于生长时的物理条件（尤其是溶液化学组成），统计研究表明这些图案可作为特定类别溶液的物理指纹。
AI.conclusion: 该研究识别出一种新的电化学过程，可在电极上生成具有光学、电学和化学对比度的物理指纹，为低成本的个人化加密标签技术（如玻璃片或微芯片上的物理加密信息）铺平了道路。

title: GPU-Accelerated Simulations of Problems with Moving Boundaries and Fluid-Structure Interaction at Extreme Scales
summary: Computational fluid dynamics and fluid-structure interaction simulations involving moving and deforming bodies is extremely hard. In this work, we present a graphical processing unit (GPU) optimized implementation of the sharp-interface immersed boundary method. The method allows performing simulation around complex stationary as well as moving bodies on a Cartesian grid. We base our implementation on the ViCar3D framework and make use of OpenACC, CUDA, NCCL and MPI. We test the implementation across grid sizes ranging from O(10million) to O(1billion) points and achieved a 20X speedup compared to existing CPU implementation. We next present our multi-GPU implementation by utilizing CUDA streams and NCCL communicators. This enables us to obtain a >90% strong and weak scaling efficiencies. Next we demonstrate the capability of the developed software to simulate a turbulent fluid flow and coupled fluid-structure interaction in flapping bat wing in flight at Re=5000.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于GPU优化的锐利界面浸没边界法，在ViCar3D框架上利用OpenACC、CUDA、NCCL和MPI实现。在千万到十亿网格点上实现20倍加速，多GPU实现超过90%的强/弱扩展效率，并成功模拟了Re=5000下蝙蝠飞行中的湍流与流固耦合问题。
AI.motivation: 传统CPU处理移动变形体的计算流体动力学和流固耦合模拟极其困难且计算量巨大，亟需高效的GPU加速方案来突破性能瓶颈。
AI.method: 基于ViCar3D框架，采用OpenACC、CUDA、NCCL和MPI实现GPU优化的锐利界面浸没边界法，支持Cartesian网格上复杂静止/运动物体的模拟，并通过CUDA流和NCCL通信器实现多GPU扩展。
AI.result: 在千万到十亿网格点上实现相对于CPU实现20倍的加速；多GPU实现超过90%的强扩展和弱扩展效率；成功在Re=5000下模拟了蝙蝠翅膀扑动飞行的湍流和流固耦合。
AI.conclusion: 所开发的GPU优化方案能显著加速移动/变形体的CFD和FSI模拟，具有出色的扩展性和实际应用能力，为复杂生物流体力学问题提供了高效计算工具。

title: Kitaev chain in synthetic dimension with cavity-controlled Majorana modes
summary: We introduce a tunable synthetic-dimension platform for realizing Kitaev-chain physics with high degree of control over Majorana zero modes. It is based on a generic Landau-quantized two dimensional electron system coupled to the magnetic flux of a superconducting LC circuit. The structured vector potential of a superconducting LC inductor induces attractive interactions between electron angular-momentum states at the lowest Landau level. These states serve as a synthetic dimension for the coveted fermionic Kitaev chain, with Majorana zero modes existing at the boundaries of the angular-momentum lattice. The crucial advantage of this proposal is the possibility of a robust, nonlocal readout and control of the Majorana states by a LC resonator. The platform relies on mature circuit QED and semiconductor technologies and provides a promising pathway to topological quantum computing.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于合成维度的可调平台，利用超导LC电路与二维电子系统结合实现Kitaev链物理，可通过LC谐振器对马约拉纳零模进行非局域读取和控制，为拓扑量子计算提供了可行路径。
AI.motivation: 现有Majorana零模系统在可调性、非局域读取和控制方面存在困难，作者希望构建一个兼具高度可调性、鲁棒非局域读取能力的平台，以实现拓扑量子计算。
AI.method: 将朗道量子化的二维电子系统与超导LC电路的磁通耦合，利用LC电感器的结构化矢势在最低朗道能级的电子角动量态之间诱导吸引相互作用，这些角动量态构成合成维度，形成Kitaev费米子链。
AI.result: 在角动量晶格的边界处实现了马约拉纳零模，并可通过LC谐振器进行鲁棒的非局域读取和控制。
AI.conclusion: 该平台结合成熟的电路QED和半导体技术，为拓扑量子计算提供了有前景的实现途径。

title: Nonlocal transport phenomena in coupled quasiperiodic Kitaev chains
summary: We investigate the topological phases in a coupled one-dimensional p-wave superconducting Fibonacci quasicrystal modeled by the quasiperiodic Kitaev chain. Recent studies have shown that the coupled system can host topological edge modes with Majorana fermions and enhance their topological protection, depending on the pattern of quasiperiodicity. In this work, we elucidate the topological phases of the coupled system and demonstrate the dependence of differential conductance on the lead connecting pattern employing the Keldysh formalism and the recursive Green's function method. Our findings reveal the emergence of topological phases in the coupled system, which are characterized by the presence of Majorana edge modes and the seepage of the Majorana wave function. Furthermore, we identify a new topological phase transition induced by quasiperiodicity in the coupled system.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了准周期Kitaev链（一维p-wave超导Fibonacci准晶耦合系统）中的拓扑相，发现该耦合系统能支持马约拉纳边缘模，并识别出一种由准周期性诱导的新拓扑相变。
AI.motivation: 探究准周期性对耦合一维p-wave超导系统中拓扑相的影响，特别是马约拉纳费米子的边缘模及其拓扑保护增强机制。
AI.method: 采用Keldysh formalism和递归格林函数方法，通过微分电导对lead连接模式的依赖性来分析拓扑相。
AI.result: 发现了耦合系统中的拓扑相，以马约拉纳边缘模和波函数渗漏为特征；识别了由准周期性诱导的新拓扑相变。
AI.conclusion: 准周期性可以在耦合超导系统中诱导新的拓扑相变，并影响马约拉纳模的拓扑保护特性。

title: An extended ab initio theory of the V$_{\text{B}}^-$ center in hBN: excited states, Jahn-Teller distortion, and pressure dependence
summary: Ensembles of negatively charged boron vacancy (V$_{\text{B}}^-$) centers in hexagonal boron nitride (hBN) have emerged as a two-dimensional spin qubit system interfaced with optics to advance nanoscale quantum sensing. However, a comprehensive description of its optically detected magnetic resonance (ODMR) signal remains challenging due to the strongly correlated nature of the excited electronic states involved in its optical cycle. In this work, we model the energetics, structural relaxation, and transition rates of the V$_{\text{B}}^-$ center using a high-level wave-function-based electron correlation method (CASSCF-NEVPT2). We provide a thorough analysis of the excited state fine structure and pseudo Jahn-Teller effects, singlet-triplet quasi-degeneracies, photoluminescence parameters, intersystem crossing pathways, and stress-dependence of the fine structure and decay parameters. Our findings not only clarify the fundamental behavior of the V$_{\text{B}}^-$ center in hBN but also establish the theoretical foundation for advancing the V$_{\text{B}}^-$ center's readout for integrated 2D quantum sensors.

AI.tldr: 本文利用高精度波函数电子关联方法（CASSCF-NEVPT2）对六方氮化硼（hBN）中带负电的硼空位中心（VB⁻）的电子结构、光物理过程及ODMR信号进行了系统建模，阐明了其激发态精细结构、自旋-轨道耦合、系间窜越路径等关键机制，为二维量子传感的读出提供了理论依据。
AI.motivation: VB⁻中心在hBN中作为二维自旋量子比特系统在纳米量子传感中具有重要前景，但其光探测磁共振（ODMR）信号由于涉及强关联的激发电子态而难以全面描述，现有理论模型尚不完善，亟需高精度理论计算来揭示其工作机制。
AI.method: 采用CASSCF-NEVPT2这一高精度波函数电子关联方法，对VB⁻中心的能量学、结构弛豫、跃迁速率进行建模，系统分析了激发态精细结构、赝Jahn-Teller效应、单态-三重态准简并、光致发光参数、系间窜越路径以及应力对精细结构和衰变参数的影响。
AI.result: 成功揭示了VB⁻中心的激发态精细结构和伪Jahn-Teller效应，阐明了单重态-三重态准简并现象，计算了光致发光参数和系间窜越路径，并给出了应力依赖的精细结构和衰变参数的变化规律。
AI.conclusion: 本研究不仅澄清了hBN中VB⁻中心的基本行为，还为推进VB⁻中心在集成二维量子传感器中的读出机制奠定了理论基础。

title: Imaging GHz surface acoustic wave modes in electrostricted LaAlO$_3$/SrTiO$_3$ heterostructures
summary: The LaAlO$_3$/SrTiO$_3$ (LAO/STO) interface hosts a gate-tunable superconducting two-dimensional electron gas (2DEG) which can be programmed to create quantum devices such as ballistic electron waveguides and quantum dots. To fully exploit this platform for quantum transport, a key requirement is the ability to shuttle single electrons, electron pairs, and other exotic states between spatially separated devices with precision. Surface acoustic waves (SAWs), which travel along the surface of a solid, offer a powerful route to achieve this through their moving electrical potential that captures and transfers electrons. %acoustoelectric coupling. In particular, SAWs in the GHz regime enable fast, controlled transport of individual quantum particles. Although this approach is well-explored in GaAs-based 2DEG, SAW generation in STO remains largely unexplored due to the lack of intrinsic piezoelectricity at room temperature. Here, we investigate room-temperature SAWs in LAO/STO and observe SAW modes up to 2.2 GHz with very low propagation loss of the order $10^{-3}$ dB per wavelength. To directly visualize these modes, we employ Atomic Acoustic Force Microscopy (AAFM), achieving sub-micron resolution imaging of the SAW wave forms, providing insight into the electrostriction-induced SAW generation mechanism. Our measurements indicate a shear horizontal-type mode, which provides the ability to couple to in-plane degrees of freedom for future acoustoelectric and quantum device applications. This work studies the fundamentals of SAW excitation and propagation on STO, a widely used and commercially available substrate, enabling straightforward coupling of SAWs to a broad range of materials that can be grown or transferred onto STO.

AI.tldr: 本文研究在LaAlO₃/SrTiO₃界面利用表面声波（SAW）实现GHz级别的低损耗声波传播，并通过原子声学力显微镜（AAFM）亚微米级成像直接观测声波模式，为量子器件中的单电子与电子对可控输运奠定基础。
AI.motivation: LAO/STO界面可编程构建量子器件（如电子波导、量子点），但需要精确操控单个电子、电子对等量子态在空间分离的器件间输运。SAW是实现这一目标的理想手段，然而STO在室温下缺乏本征压电性，导致GHz频段SAW的激发与传播机制尚不明确。
AI.method: 在室温下于LAO/STO结构中激发SAW，利用原子声学力显微镜（AAFM）以亚微米分辨率对声波波形进行直接成像，从而分析声波模式与传播损耗特性。
AI.result: 观测到高达2.2 GHz的SAW模式，传播损耗极低（约10⁻³ dB/波长）。AAFM成像揭示电致伸缩是STO中SAW产生的主要机制，声波模式为剪切水平型（shear horizontal-type）。
AI.conclusion: 本研究阐明了STO上SAW激发与传播的物理机制，其低损耗特性及对平面内自由度的耦合能力为未来声电耦合与量子器件应用提供了可行路径，且STO作为商用衬底可兼容多种功能材料。

title: Finite-size scaling properties of classical random walk on various two-dimensional lattices
summary: We consider various two-dimensional lattices such as square, Kagome, Lieb, honeycomb, dice lattices of finite extent, to study the effect of lattice profile in terms of the number of nearest neighbour and connectivity patterns on the classical random walk in the unbiased scenario. We find that the standard deviation of distance travelled by the walker is insensitive to the non-uniformity of the lattice profile leading to diffusive transport even in the finite size lattices. Our study indicates that the mass fractal dimension varies within a window $1.50\pm 0.03$ for all finite-size lattices. A weak ordering within the above window, correlated with the average coordination number, is observed, while Lieb and square lattices yielding the minimum and maximum values, respectively. However, confidence intervals reveal substantial statistical overlap for several lattice pairs even though the lattice profiles vary as far as the average number of connecting bonds and directionality of bonds are concerned. We also study the scaling complexity of the circumference of the closed curve traced by the walker while investigating the hull dimension. We find similar trend for hull fractal dimension as well and that was found to within the window $1.37\pm 0.03$ for finite-size lattices. Within the above window, the ordering remains qualitatively unaltered as compared to mass dimension while the confidence interval rectifies the order quantitatively. The square lattice clearly exhibits the upper bound for hull fractal dimension and the remaining lattices show extensive statistical overlap within the above window. We exhibit a tendency of the mass and hull fractal dimension to reach their thermodynamic values given by Brownian motion when we allow more number of steps within the finite size of the lattice, as confirmed by a data collapse analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了二维有限晶格（方形、Kagome、Lieb、蜂窝、骰子晶格）上经典随机游走的性质，发现质量分形维数和 hull 分形维数分别在约1.50±0.03和1.37±0.03的窗口内，与晶格构型关联弱；当步数增加时，二者趋向布朗运动的热力学极限值。
AI.motivation: 探究不同晶格构型（配位数和连接模式）对经典随机游走扩散行为的影响，特别是质量分形维数和 hull 分形维数在有限尺寸晶格中的变化规律。
AI.method: 在方形、Kagome、Lieb、蜂窝、骰子五种二维有限晶格上模拟无偏经典随机游走；计算游走距离的标准差、质量分形维数和 hull 分形维数；通过置信区间和数据分析（data collapse）比较不同晶格的结果。
AI.result: 标准差对晶格构型不敏感，均为扩散输运；质量分形维数在1.50±0.03窗口内，与平均配位数弱相关（Lieb最小，方形最大），但多数晶格统计重叠；hull 分形维数在1.37±0.03窗口内，方形晶格为上界，其余晶格统计重叠显著；增加步数时二者趋向布朗运动的热力学值。
AI.conclusion: 有限尺寸下晶格构型对随机游走分形维数的影响较弱，步数增加时趋向布朗运动极限，表明非均匀晶格仍保持普适的扩散行为。

title: CDFCI: High-Performance Parallel Software for Many-Body Large-Scale Eigenvalue Problems
summary: CDFCI is a shared-memory parallel numerical program for computing low-lying eigenpairs of large-scale, non-relativistic fermionic Hamiltonians. The software is designed to handle a broad class of many-body quantum models, including both ab initio electronic structure Hamiltonians and lattice-based Hamiltonians arising in condensed matter physics. CDFCI combines an efficient coordinate-descent-based selected configuration interaction algorithm with dedicated parallelization strategies, achieving high performance on modern multi-core architectures. Benchmark results on representative quantum chemistry and condensed matter test cases demonstrate that CDFCI attains state-of-the-art accuracy with competitive performance compared to established selected configuration interaction (such as CIPSI or SHCI) and DMRG implementations. The software is open-source, extensively documented, and provides a Python interface for seamless integration with PySCF and other many-body simulation workflows.

AI.tldr: CDFCI是一个基于坐标下降法的共享内存并行数值程序，用于计算大规模非相对论费米子哈密顿量的低能本征对，支持从头算电子结构模型和晶格模型，达到最先进精度且性能优越，开源并提供Python接口。
AI.motivation: 解决大规模费米子哈密顿量低能本征对计算的高精度与高性能需求，同时支持多种物理模型（量子化学和凝聚态物理），并弥补现有选组态相互作用（如CIPSI、SHCI）和DMRG实现中的性能与易用性不足。
AI.method: 采用坐标下降法（coordinate-descent-based）的选组态相互作用算法，结合专用并行化策略，在共享内存多核架构上实现高效计算，并通过Python接口与PySCF等工作流集成。
AI.result: 在代表性量子化学和凝聚态物理测试案例上，CDFCI达到最先进精度，且性能与已有的选组态相互作用（CIPSI、SHCI）及DMRG实现相比具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: CDFCI是一个高性能、开源、文档完善且易于集成的多体量子模拟工具，适用于量子化学和凝聚态物理领域的大规模计算任务。

title: Giant orbital-magnon conversion driven perpendicular magnetization switching
summary: The pursuit of beyond-Moore information technologies has stimulated the exploration of novel information carriers, such as electron spin, orbital, and magnon, beyond electron charge. Efficient interconversion among these degrees of freedom and precise control over the information states are crucial for advancing nanoelectronic devices. However, a direct coupling between orbital angular momentum (L) and magnons (M) has remained elusive, and magnetization switching through orbital-to-magnon (L-M) conversion has not yet been achieved. Here, we report the experimental demonstration of L-M conversion in an orbital metal/antiferromagnetic insulator bilayer at room temperature, with an efficiency over an order of magnitude higher than that in traditional orbital systems lacking the L-M process. Consequently, we achieved efficient room-temperature perpendicular magnetization switching in a CoFeB ferromagnetic layer mediated by this new mechanism. Our findings establish a direct link between orbitronics and magnonics, providing a new platform for the development of advanced nano-devices based on orbital-driven magnonic phenomena.

AI.tldr: 本文在室温下首次实验证明了轨道角动量与反铁磁绝缘体中磁子的直接耦合（L-M转换），效率比传统轨道系统高一个数量级，并成功实现了CoFeB铁磁层的垂直磁化翻转，将轨道电子学与磁子学直接联系起来。
AI.motivation: 超越摩尔定律的信息技术需要探索新型信息载体（如电子自旋、轨道和磁子），而轨道角动量（L）与磁子（M）之间的直接耦合一直未被证实，磁化翻转也未通过L-M转换实现。
AI.method: 在轨道金属/反铁磁绝缘体双层结构中，实验实现了室温下的L-M转换，并通过这种新机制介导实现了CoFeB铁磁层的垂直磁化翻转。
AI.result: L-M转换效率比传统缺少L-M过程的轨道系统高一个数量级以上，成功实现了室温下的高效垂直磁化翻转。
AI.conclusion: 该研究建立了轨道电子学与磁子学之间的直接联系，为基于轨道驱动磁子现象的先进纳米器件开发提供了新平台。

title: Response tensor for the superconducting (Josephson) diode effect
summary: We propose a response tensor $\mathbf{\hat χ}$ to characterize the non-reciprocal critical current response of the superconducting (Josephson) diode effect. It describes the coupling between the dipole component of the angular distribution of the critical current and the applied magnetic field -- an analogue to the Hall response in the normal state. In quasi-2D systems with Rashba spin-orbit coupling and point group symmetries $C_{3v}$, $C_{4v}$ or $C_{6v}$, this tensor takes a fully antisymmetric form. When nematicity is present, a symmetric contribution emerges, providing an indicator of the nematic order in the superconducting state. In contrast, for systems exhibiting Dresselhaus spin-orbit coupling with the $D_{2d}$ symmetry, the tensor becomes diagonal traceless, and nematicity brings in a trace part. Our analysis not only accounts for the superconducting diode effect under external applied or intrinsic effective magnetic fields, but also predicts the symmetry conditions for realizing the diode effect when the magnetic field is aligned with the current. Beyond this, the proposed tensor provides a promising tool for detecting nematicity and potential nematic transitions deep within the superconducting phase. It may also encode additional information about the underlying electronic structure and symmetry-breaking orders, warranting further experimental investigation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个响应张量 $\mathbf{\hat χ}$ 来表征超导（约瑟夫森）二极管效应的非互易临界电流响应，描述了临界电流角分布偶极分量与外加磁场的耦合，类似于正常态的霍尔响应。该张量在不同对称性系统中呈现不同形式（全反对称、对称、对角无迹等），可用于检测超导态中的向列序及其他对称性破缺序。
AI.motivation: 当前对超导二极管效应的理解缺乏统一的对称性分析框架，尤其是临界电流对角分布的偶极特性与磁场的耦合关系尚未被系统描述。本文旨在提出一个普适的张量形式来统一描述不同对称性系统下的超导二极管效应，并探索其作为探测向列序和对称性破缺序的工具的潜力。
AI.method: 本文通过理论推导提出一个响应张量 $\mathbf{\hat χ}$，该张量描述临界电流的角分布偶极分量与外加磁场的耦合。研究分析了不同点群对称性（$C_{3v}$、$C_{4v}$、$C_{6v}$、$D_{2d}$）下该张量的形式变化，以及向列性（nematicity）对张量对称性的影响。
AI.result: 1. 在Rashba自旋轨道耦合的准二维系统中（$C_{3v}$、$C_{4v}$、$C_{6v}$对称性），该张量呈全反对称形式；2. 向列性引入对称贡献，可作为超导态向列序的指标；3. 在Dresselhaus自旋轨道耦合的$D_{2d}$对称系统中，张量变为对角无迹形式，向列性进一步引入迹部分；4. 该张量还能预测磁场与电流平行时实现二极管效应的对称性条件。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的响应张量不仅统一描述了外加有效磁场和本征有效磁场下的超导二极管效应，还为检测超导相内部的向列序及向列相变提供了有前景的工具。该张量可能还编码了更多关于电子结构和对称性破缺序的信息，值得进一步的实验研究。

title: Spin Dynamics from Atomistic Quantum Simulations
summary: Optically active solid-state spin defects are promising candidates for quantum applications, however a unified theoretical framework to predict their spin dynamics at high temperatures is not yet available. Here, using Kubo linear--response theory, we derive expressions of spin-lattice and decoherence times \(T_1\) and \(T_2\) in terms of correlation functions of spin--lattice couplings. We then evaluate \(T_1\) and \(T_2\) from molecular dynamics and spin--lattice interaction time--series generated by state--of--the--art machine learning models trained on {\it ab--initio} data. Finally we measure \(T_1\) times for the NV center in diamond and compare experimental and theoretical results, showing excellent agreement.

AI.tldr: 本文利用Kubo线性响应理论推导了固态自旋缺陷的自旋-晶格弛豫时间T1和退相干时间T2的理论表达式，结合分子动力学和机器学习模型计算这些时间，并通过NV色心实验验证了理论方法的准确性。
AI.motivation: 目前缺乏一个统一的理论框架来预测高温下固态自旋缺陷的自旋动力学行为。
AI.method: 基于Kubo线性响应理论推导T1和T2的表达式，利用分子动力学和基于第一性原理数据训练的机器学习模型生成自旋-晶格相互作用时间序列，进而计算T1和T2。
AI.result: 实验测量的NV色心T1时间与理论计算结果高度吻合。
AI.conclusion: 该理论框架能够准确预测固态自旋缺陷在高温下的自旋动力学，为相关量子应用提供了有力工具。

title: Second quantization of anyons and spin-anyon duality
summary: Anyons exhibit a non-trivial interplay between local exclusion rules and non-local braiding and exchange phases, making a consistent commutation algebra and second-quantized formulation challenging. We develop an algebraic framework for Abelian anyons in one dimension with statistical phase $θ$ = $π$/N that enforces a finite on-site occupancy of N-1 anyons with the exchange phase $θ$ between different sites. Moreover, we introduce an exact Jordan-Wigner duality between $π$/3 anyons and spin-1 operators, allowing us to map a tight-binding anyon model to an XY-like spin-1 model. The model exhibits anyon-density-dependent flux, incompressible or gapless regions, and critical points with level crossings that appear as discontinuities in ground-state currents, momenta, fidelities, and correlation functions. Our second-quantization formalism establishes a novel spin anyon duality, offering a conceptually new route to realize anyons from spin Hamiltonians and to engineer corresponding device architectures.

AI.tldr: 本文为阿贝尔任意子建立了一种一维代数框架，发现π/3任意子与自旋-1算符之间存在精确的Jordan-Wigner对偶性，并揭示了任意子密度依赖的磁通、不可压缩/无带隙区域及临界点等丰富物理现象。
AI.motivation: 任意子因同时具有局域排斥规则和非局域编织交换相位，其一致的交换代数和二次量子化形式化描述面临挑战，现有理论框架尚不完善。
AI.method: 建立了一维阿贝尔任意子的代数框架（统计相位θ=π/N，占据数上限为N-1）；引入π/3任意子与自旋-1算符之间的精确Jordan-Wigner对偶，将紧束缚任意子模型映射为XY-like自旋-1模型。
AI.result: 发现任意子密度依赖的磁通、不可压缩或无带隙区域，以及在基态电流、动量、保真度和关联函数中出现不连续性的临界点与能级交叉。
AI.conclusion: 该二次量子化形式建立了新颖的自旋-任意子对偶性，为实现从自旋哈密顿量构建任意子及设计相应器件架构提供了新途径。

title: The unique, universal entropy for complex systems
summary: An axiomatic foundation regarding the entropy for complex systems is established. Missing from decades of research was the requirement that entropy must measure the uncertainty at the informational scale of the maximizing distribution, where the log-log slope equals $-1$. Additionally, entropy must be extensive across the full universality scaling classes defined by Hanel-Thurner. The coupled entropy, maximized by the coupled stretched exponential distributions, is proven to be the unique, universal entropy that satisfies these requirements. The non-additivity of the entropy is equal to the long-range dependence or nonlinear statistical coupling. The entropy-matched extensivity is a function of the coupling, stretching parameter, and dimensions. Evidence is provided that the Tsallis $q$-statistics creates misalignment in the physical modeling of complex systems. Information thermodynamic applications are reviewed, including measuring complexity, a zeroth law of temperature, the thermodynamic consistency of the coupled free energy, and a model of intelligence in non-equilibrium.

AI.tldr: 本文为复杂系统建立了熵的公理化基础，提出了熵必须在信息尺度上度量不确定性（log-log斜率为-1）且必须在Hanel-Thurner全域标度类中具有广延性。证明耦合熵（由耦合拉伸指数分布最大化）是满足这些条件的唯一普适熵，并指出Tsallis q-统计在复杂系统建模中会导致物理失配。
AI.motivation: 数十年研究中缺乏一个关键要求：熵必须在最大化分布的信息尺度（log-log斜率为-1）上度量不确定性，且必须在全域标度类中具有广延性。现有熵（如Tsallis熵）在复杂系统建模中存在物理失配问题。
AI.method: 通过建立公理化框架，提出两个核心要求：(1)熵必须在信息尺度上度量不确定性；(2)熵必须在Hanel-Thurner定义的全域标度类中具有广延性。进而证明耦合熵是唯一满足这些要求的普适熵。
AI.result: 耦合熵被证明是唯一的普适熵，其非可加性等于长程依赖或非线性统计耦合；熵匹配的广延性是耦合、拉伸参数和维度的函数；Tsallis q-统计在复杂系统物理建模中会导致失配。
AI.conclusion: 该公理化基础为复杂系统提供了更一致的熵框架，并在信息热力学中有广泛应用，包括复杂性度量、温度热力学第零定律、耦合自由能的热力学一致性以及非平衡智能模型。

title: An MRI-informed poromechanical model for organ-scale prediction of glioma growth
summary: Gliomas constitute one of the most aggressive and heterogeneous forms of brain tumors, posing major challenges for understanding their biology and developing effective treatments. Animal models enable the collection of rich longitudinal datasets describing tumor dynamics, which can be integrated within mathematical models to elucidate the biological mechanisms governing tumor growth. While most formulations rely on reaction-diffusion systems with limited insight on tissue deformation and fluid transport, we propose a magnetic resonance imaging (MRI)-informed, poroelastic model to describe C6 glioma growth in rats. We use data from animals (n=4) that were imaged five times after intracranial injection of cancer cells. Each MRI dataset includes (i) anatomical T1-weighted data for brain and tumor segmentation and to assign mechanical properties; (ii) diffusion-weighted MRI, which enables estimation of the fraction of each voxel that is tumor; and (iii) dynamic contrast-enhanced MRI, which informs permeability as well as vascular and liquid fraction maps. Using finite-element simulations, model calibration for each rat uses the Levenberg-Marquardt method informed by the first three MRI datasets. Tumor forecasts are validated by assessing model-data agreement on the remaining two MRI datasets. Our results show relative tumor volume errors between 0.94 percent and 11.27 percent at calibration, and prediction errors between 4.73 percent and 36.03 percent. Additionally, Dice scores ranged from 0.80 to 0.93 during calibration, and from 0.75 to 0.93 during validation. Thus, our results suggest that our poromechanical model can describe C6 glioma growth. This study provides a first step toward a patient-specific, multiscale model of the spatiotemporal poromechanics underlying glioma progression and therapeutic response.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个基于MRI信息的孔隙弹性模型，用于描述大鼠C6胶质瘤生长。利用4只大鼠的五次MRI数据（包括T1加权、扩散加权和动态对比增强MRI），通过有限元模拟和Levenberg-Marquardt方法进行模型校准，并在剩余两次MRI数据上验证预测。结果显示校准的肿瘤体积相对误差为0.94%-11.27%，预测误差为4.73%-36.03%，Dice评分为0.75-0.93，表明该孔隙力学模型能有效描述胶质瘤生长。
AI.motivation: 胶质瘤是侵袭性强、异质性高的脑肿瘤，现有反应-扩散模型无法充分描述组织变形和液体输运对肿瘤生长的影响，亟需更全面的力学模型。
AI.method: 构建MRI信息驱动的孔隙弹性模型，整合T1加权、扩散加权和动态对比增强MRI数据，通过有限元模拟和Levenberg-Marquardt方法进行参数校准，使用前三次MRI数据校准，后两次数据验证预测效果。
AI.result: 校准阶段肿瘤体积相对误差0.94%-11.27%，预测阶段4.73%-36.03%；Dice评分在校准阶段0.80-0.93，验证阶段0.75-0.93。
AI.conclusion: 孔隙力学模型能有效描述C6胶质瘤生长，为患者特异性、多尺度的胶质瘤进展和治疗反应的时空孔隙力学模型奠定了基础。

title: Quantum Coherence Reshapes Thermodynamic Bounds for Thermal Machines
summary: Thermodynamic Uncertainty Relations (TURs) set universal bounds linking current fluctuations to entropy production in nonequilibrium steady states. Their multidimensional generalization (MTUR) introduces matrix inequalities connecting current covariances and mean values. We analyze these bounds in a paradigmatic quantum thermal device, a two-terminal conductor, operating as a heat engine, refrigerator, or heat pump. We show that classical performance limits on efficiency and coefficient of performance remain constrained by the TUR when finite power or heat flow from cold to hot reservoirs is maintained, even in regimes dominated by coherent transport. We further identify the conditions that optimize TUR and MTUR violations, demonstrating that cross-correlations can enhance the joint precision of charge and heat currents near the linear-response regime.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了热力学不确定关系(TUR)及其多维推广(MTUR)在双端量子热器件(热机、制冷机、热泵)中的表现，发现即使在相干输运主导区域，经典性能极限仍受TUR约束，并识别了优化TUR和MTUR违反的条件，表明在近线性响应区域交叉关联可增强电荷与热流的联合精度。
AI.motivation: 探究热力学不确定关系(TUR)及其多维推广(MTUR)在量子热器件(热机、制冷机、热泵)中的适用性与约束边界，特别是在相干输运主导的量子区域中，经典性能极限是否仍然受到TUR的约束。
AI.method: 以双端导体作为范例量子热器件，分别在其工作于热机、制冷机和热泵模式下，分析TUR和MTUR对效率、性能系数等性能指标的限制，并研究电荷流与热流的协方差矩阵及交叉关联。
AI.result: 经典性能极限在相干输运主导的量子区域中仍受TUR约束；交叉关联可在近线性响应区域增强电荷与热流的联合精度，优化TUR和MTUR的违反。
AI.conclusion: TUR对量子热器件的性能约束具有普适性，而MTUR揭示了交叉关联对提升多电流联合精度的积极作用，为优化量子热器件性能提供了理论指导。

title: Hydrogen-induced volume expansion in hexagonal close-packed iron: Effects of pressure and temperature
summary: Hydrogen is a promising candidate for the light element in terrestrial planetary cores. Its incorporation into iron causes significant volume expansion, leading to a substantial density deficit. Although extensive studies have been conducted on iron hydride (FeH$_{x}$) with the fcc structure, the thermoelastic properties on FeHx with hcp structure (hcp-FeH$_{x}$) remain unconstrained because of the experimental difficulties to control hydrogen content. Here, we synthesized hcp-FeH$_{x}$ with controlled hydrogen contents under high-pressure and high-temperature conditions. We carried out \textit{in situ} X-ray diffraction measurements on hcp-FeH$_{x}$ at 10--25~GPa and 300--900~K using a Kawai-type mutilanvil apparatus and constructed their equations of state. By combining our results with previously reported equations of state for hcp-Fe and experimental determinations of hydrogen content in hcp-FeH$_{x}$, we demonstrated that the discrepancies in the hydrogen-induced volume expansion coefficient can be clearly explained by its pressure and temperature dependence. Our results revealed that the hydrogen-induced volume expansion of hcp-Fe exhibits a strong temperature dependence at low pressures, but its temperature effect significantly weakens with increasing pressure. We also showed that the density reduction of Fe by hydrogenation depends on its crystal structure. These findings demonstrate that estimates of hydrogen content in iron at planetary interior conditions based on hydrogen-induced volume expansion need to be revised by properly accounting for its $PT$-dependence and crystal structure.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过高压高温实验合成了可控氢含量的六方密堆积结构铁氢化物（hcp-FeHₓ），建立了10–25 GPa和300–900 K条件下的状态方程，揭示了氢致体积膨胀系数对压力和温度的依赖性，并指出估算行星内部铁中氢含量时需考虑PT依赖性和晶体结构。
AI.motivation: 氢是类地行星核中轻元素的重要候选，但以往研究多集中于面心立方结构（fcc）的铁氢化物，而六方密堆积结构（hcp）的铁氢化物因实验难以控制氢含量，其热弹性性质尚未被约束，这限制了对行星核成分和密度的准确理解。
AI.method: 在10–25 GPa和300–900 K条件下，利用Kawai型多砧装置合成可控氢含量的hcp-FeHₓ，并进行原位X射线衍射测量，构建其状态方程，结合先前hcp-Fe的状态方程和氢含量实验测定结果，分析氢致体积膨胀系数的压力-温度依赖性。
AI.result: 发现hcp-Fe的氢致体积膨胀在低压下表现出强温度依赖性，但随着压力升高，温度效应显著减弱；氢致铁的密度降低取决于其晶体结构。
AI.conclusion: 基于氢致体积膨胀估算行星内部铁中氢含量时，必须充分考虑压力-温度依赖性和晶体结构的影响，否则会导致显著误差。

title: Melting upon cooling in a quantum magnet
summary: Heating enhances thermal fluctuations and typically leads to melting of solids, but in exceptional cases, heating can also cause liquids to solidify. The paradigm of this counterintuitive phenomenon is solidification of liquid $^3$He upon increasing temperature, known as the Pomeranchuk effect. Here we show that such inverse melting also appears in quantum magnetism. We find that, on cooling, the Ising-like triangular-lattice antiferromagnet erbium heptatantalate first develops a three-sublattice long-range magnetic order -- analogous to a solid -- which then, unexpectedly, melts at even lower temperatures into a short-range correlated spin-stripe state -- analogous to a liquid. We propose that such an unprecedented ``spin Pomeranchuk effect" can generically arise from strong competition between spin-spin interactions in frustrated magnets, and provides a novel avenue to transformations between exotic magnetic phases.

AI.tldr: 本文报告了一种类似Pomeranchuk效应的“自旋Pomeranchuk效应”：在三角晶格Ising反铁磁体七钽酸铒中，随着温度降低，系统先形成长程磁有序（类似固体），然后在更低温度下意外地熔化成为短程相关的自旋条纹态（类似液体）。研究提出，这种逆熔化现象源于阻挫磁体中自旋相互作用的强烈竞争，为奇异磁相之间的转变提供了新途径。
AI.motivation: 探索逆熔化（加热使液体凝固）现象在量子磁性中的存在可能性，寻找类似液氦-3中Pomeranchuk效应的磁性对应物。
AI.method: 通过研究Ising型三角晶格反铁磁体七钽酸铒（erbium heptatantalate）的磁性行为，观察其在变温过程中的有序-无序转变。
AI.result: 发现该材料在降温过程中先形成三子格长程磁有序（类似固体），继续降温到更低温度后，该有序反而熔化成为短程相关的自旋条纹态（类似液体），呈现逆熔化行为。
AI.conclusion: 这种“自旋Pomeranchuk效应”可普遍源于阻挫磁体中自旋-自旋相互作用的强烈竞争，为探索奇异磁相之间的转变提供了新途径。

title: Role of mass fluctuations in the diffusion of clusters of Brownian particles with activity
summary: Motivated by the anomalous diffusion observed in clusters of active Brownian particles (ABPs), where the center-of-mass diffusion coefficient scales as $D\sim N^{-1/2}$ with respect to the number $N$ of particles in the cluster, we derive a minimal theoretical framework starting from the single-particle Langevin equations. The model consists of two coupled stochastic equations: one for the cluster center-of-mass trajectory and one for the mass evolution $N(t)$, explicitly accounting for stochastic displacements induced by particle attachment and detachment. We specialize and validate the framework against ABP simulations of isolated clusters in stationary conditions, where $N(t)$ follows a Gaussian process with mean $N_0$, variance $\propto N_0^β$, and persistence time $\propto N_0^κ$. Analytical solution of the coupled equations yields the long-time diffusion coefficient as the sum of two contributions: a conventional term $\propto N_0^{-1}$) due to thermal noise plus summation of active forces, and a fluctuation-driven term $\propto N_0^{-δ}$ with $δ=2-2/d-β+κ$, where $d$ is the spatial dimension. We demonstrate that anomalous scaling emerges whenever the second term becomes dominant. The model predicts $D\sim N^{-α}$ with $α=0.63\pm0.06$, in good quantitative agreement with large-scale ABP simulations.

AI.tldr: 本文从单粒子朗之万方程出发，构建了一个由团簇质心轨迹和质量演化$N(t)$两个耦合随机方程组成的理论框架，用以解释活性布朗粒子（ABP）团簇中观测到的反常扩散现象（$D\sim N^{-1/2}$）。通过解析求解，得到长时扩散系数由热噪声项（$\propto N_0^{-1}$）和涨落驱动项（$\propto N_0^{-\delta}$）组成，后者主导时出现反常标度，预测$D\sim N^{-\alpha}$，$\alpha=0.63\pm0.06$，与大规模ABP模拟定量吻合。
AI.motivation: 解释活性布朗粒子团簇中观测到的中心质量扩散系数$D\sim N^{-1/2}$这一反常标度行为（传统预期为$D\sim N^{-1}$），构建最小理论框架揭示其物理机制。
AI.method: 从单粒子朗之万方程出发，推导出团簇质心轨迹与质量演化$N(t)$的耦合随机方程。$N(t)$被视为高斯过程，具有均值$N_0$、方差$\propto N_0^\beta$和持久时间$\propto N_0^\kappa$。解析求解耦合方程得到长时扩散系数表达式。
AI.result: 扩散系数由两项组成：传统项$\propto N_0^{-1}$（热噪声+主动力）和涨落驱动项$\propto N_0^{-\delta}$，其中$\delta=2-2/d-\beta+\kappa$。当涨落项主导时出现反常标度。模型预测$D\sim N^{-\alpha}$，$\alpha=0.63\pm0.06$，与ABP模拟定量吻合。
AI.conclusion: 成功构建了能解释ABP团簇反常扩散的解析理论框架，揭示了粒子附着/脱附引起的质量涨落是反常标度的关键机制，为理解活性物质中集体输运行为提供了理论基础。

title: Spin-wave bandgap engineering via mode hybridization in dipolar-coupled YIG film/CoFeB nanodisk magnonic crystals
summary: We investigate spin-wave transport in hybrid two-dimensional magnonic crystals comprising a low-damping yttrium iron garnet (YIG) film coupled to a periodic array of CoFeB nanodisks. Using propagating spin-wave spectroscopy, super-Nyquist magneto-optical Kerr effect microscopy, and micromagnetic simulations, we demonstrate the formation of pronounced and tunable bandgaps that do not originate from conventional Bragg scattering. Instead, these gaps arise from hybridization between the fundamental magnonic-crystal mode and in-plane transverse standing modes induced by the periodic nanodisk array. The spectral position and width of these gaps are controlled by geometric parameters and by the magnetic state of the nanodisks, including their vortex configuration, which governs both static and dynamic dipolar coupling. For larger lattice periods, additional gaps emerge through hybridization with modes quantized both transverse and parallel to the spin-wave propagation direction, reflecting dispersion folding in two dimensions. Our results establish mode hybridization as a versatile mechanism for engineering spin-wave band structures beyond the constraints of Bragg scattering and provide a pathway toward reconfigurable magnonic devices based on dipolar-coupled hybrid architectures.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了混合二维磁子晶体中的自旋波传输，发现能带隙源于模式杂化而非传统布拉格散射，并通过CoFeB纳米盘阵列与YIG薄膜的偶极耦合实现可调谐，为可重构磁子器件提供了新途径。
AI.motivation: 探索超越传统布拉格散射机制的自旋波能带工程新方法，实现可调谐、可重构的磁子晶体器件。
AI.method: 采用传播自旋波谱学、超奈奎斯特磁光克尔效应显微镜和微磁模拟相结合的手段，研究YIG薄膜与CoFeB纳米盘阵列耦合体系的自旋波输运特性。
AI.result: 观察到显著且可调的能带隙，其源于磁子晶体基本模式与纳米盘阵列诱导的面内横向驻波模式的杂化；能隙位置和宽度可通过几何参数和纳米盘磁态（包括涡旋构型）调控；大周期下出现更多杂化能隙。
AI.conclusion: 模式杂化是一种超越布拉格散射限制的自旋波能带工程设计机制，为基于偶极耦合混合架构的可重构磁子器件提供了可行路径。

title: Magnetic influence on ion transport in concentrated solid solutions: An analytic investigation
summary: It is well established that magnetic fields have a significant effect on transport in certain classes of electronic conductors. Less reported, however, are similar effects in solid ionic conductors. Despite the rarity of Hall mobility measurements in ionic conductors, recent experimental work in batteries and other systems has demonstrated that an applied magnetic field can significantly and beneficially alter ionic transport and electrochemical processes in solid materials in a way that would not be predicted from naïve Hall coefficient estimates. In this work, the influence of a magnetic field on ion transport in solids is investigated analytically, and general multi-component transport equations accounting for magnetic effects are presented. Specific models are then derived for solid, isotropic binary and single ion conductors. Material property combinations for which magnetic field influence may become significant are then computed for certain systems subject to compositional constraints. Finally, it is demonstrated that the derived model for binary conductors in a magnetic field fits experimental magneto-resistance data well for the fluoride ion conducting solid Pb$_{0.66}$Cd$_{0.34}$F$_2$, provided an assumption of near degenerate multi-component transport.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了磁场对固体离子导体中离子输运的影响，提出了考虑磁效应的通用多组分输运方程，并推导了二元和单离子导体的具体模型。通过实验数据验证，该模型能很好地拟合Pb₀.₆₆Cd₀.₃₄F₂氟离子导体的磁阻数据。
AI.motivation: 虽然磁场对电子导体的输运影响已被充分研究，但磁场对固体离子导体的类似效应却鲜有报道。近年实验发现磁场能显著改变固体材料中的离子输运和电化学过程，这无法用简单的霍尔系数估计预测，因此需要建立理论模型来解释和预测这些现象。
AI.method: 采用解析方法研究磁场对固体中离子输运的影响，推导了考虑磁效应的一般多组分输运方程；进而针对固体各向同性二元导体和单离子导体导出具体模型；计算了特定组成约束下磁场影响显著的物性组合；最后用实验磁阻数据验证了模型。
AI.result: 推导了磁场下二元导体的模型，该模型能很好地拟合Pb₀.₆₆Cd₀.₃₄F₂固体氟离子导体的实验磁阻数据，前提是假设近简并的多组分输运条件。
AI.conclusion: 磁场对固体离子导体的输运有显著影响，所提出的理论模型能够有效描述和预测这一现象，为未来在电池等系统中利用磁场调控离子输运提供了理论基础。

title: Search for magnetoacoustic quantum oscillations in the insulating phase of YbB$_{12}$
summary: A highly exotic phenomenon in solid-state physics is the observation of magnetic quantum oscillations in insulators. For instance, in the Kondo insulator YbB$_{12}$ various groups reported the observation of such oscillations seemingly originating from Fermi surfaces, though this contradicts the concept of an insulator having no charged quasiparticles. In this study, we searched for quantum oscillations in YbB$_{12}$ by using bulk-sensitive ultrasonic experiments in high magnetic fields up to 65 T and down to 485 mK. For that, we utilized an YbB$_{12}$ single crystal that, in previous experiments, revealed oscillations in the magnetoresistance in the insulating state. We confirmed oscillation-like behavior of the magnetoresistance as well as field-dependent oscillations in the magnetocaloric effect. However, we could not observe magnetoacoustic quantum oscillations in the insulating state, only in the field-induced metallic state. In the insulating state, we found some anomalies in our ultrasound data, the origin of which remains elusive. Our findings provide further information on the puzzling behavior of the insulating state of YbB$_{12}$.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过超声波实验在强磁场下搜索YbB₁₂中的磁量子振荡，在绝缘态未观测到磁声量子振荡，仅在场致金属态中发现，并对绝缘态中观测到的异常现象提出新见解。
AI.motivation: 探索Kondo绝缘体YbB₁₂中看似矛盾的磁量子振荡现象——绝缘体中不应存在费米面，但先前实验却报告了类似振荡。
AI.method: 使用体敏感的超声波实验，在高达65 T的强磁场和低至485 mK的温度下，对先前已显示磁阻振荡的YbB₁₂单晶进行测量。
AI.result: 确认了绝缘态中的磁阻振荡行为和磁卡效应中的场相关振荡，但未观测到磁声量子振荡；仅在场致金属态中观测到超声量子振荡；绝缘态中发现一些来源不明的超声异常。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果进一步揭示了YbB₁₂绝缘态的谜样行为，对理解绝缘体中量子振荡的起源提供了新的约束信息。

title: Symmetric estimator for discrete self-energy of discrete many-body systems
summary: We derive a discrete spectral representation of the single-particle self-energy using a discrete evaluation of Kugler's symmetric improved estimator. Our construction can be used on both the real and the complex (Matsubara) frequency axis. It is guaranteed to remain causal at the numerical level, in contrast to standard approaches that may generate unphysical negative spectral weight or require additional broadening. Our representation can be used for any Hamiltonian; here we apply it to quantum impurity models and in dynamical mean-field theory. The latter is formulated with a discrete hybridization function throughout its self-consistency loop. In both cases and across various numerical methods, we obtain significantly improved accuracy for a range of impurity properties.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Kugler对称改进估计量的离散谱表示方法，用于计算单粒子自能，在实轴和复频率轴上都保持因果性，避免了传统方法中的负谱权重问题，并在量子杂质模型和动力学平均场理论中显著提高了计算精度。
AI.motivation: 传统自能计算方法在数值上可能产生非物理的负谱权重，或需要额外加宽处理，缺乏因果性保证。因此需要一种在所有频率轴上都能保持因果性的离散谱表示方法。
AI.method: 基于Kugler的对称改进估计量，推导出单粒子自能的离散谱表示。该方法可同时应用于实轴和Matsubara复频率轴，并通过离散杂化函数在整个自洽循环中保持因果性。
AI.result: 在量子杂质模型和DMFT框架下，该方法在多种数值方法中均显著提升了对杂质属性的计算精度，且消除了负谱权重问题。
AI.conclusion: 该离散谱表示方法具有通用性（适用于任意哈密顿量），在保持因果性的同时提供了更高的数值精度，为量子杂质模型和DMFT计算提供了更可靠的框架。

title: Nonequilibrium Fluctuation-Response Theory in the Frequency Domain
comment: 18 pages and 5 figures for main text, 12 pages for appendix
summary: We develop a unified fluctuation-response theory in the frequency domain for nonequilibrium steady states governed by overdamped Langevin dynamics and Markov jump processes. The relation expresses the power spectrum of general observables exactly as a quadratic form of local responses measured at the same frequency, thereby extending static nonequilibrium fluctuation-response relations to finite frequencies. The decomposition is spatial for Langevin systems and edge-resolved for Markov jump processes, and applies uniformly to state-dependent observables, current-like observables, and their combinations. As consequences of the same identity, we derive frequency-domain response uncertainty relations, kinetic and thermodynamic uncertainty relations, the equilibrium fluctuation-dissipation theorem, and Harada-Sasa-type relations. Applications to stochastic networks and driven diffusive systems illustrate how the theory resolves fluctuation spectra into edge-wise contributions and reveals frequency-dependent tradeoffs between fluctuations, response, and dissipation.

AI.tldr: 本文发展了非平衡稳态（过阻尼朗之万动力学和马尔可夫跳变过程）在频域上的统一涨落-响应理论，将可观测量的功率谱精确表达为同一频率下局部响应的二次型，并由此推导出频域响应不确定性关系、动力学和热力学不确定性关系、平衡涨落-耗散定理以及Harada-Sasa类关系。
AI.motivation: 将静态非平衡涨落-响应关系推广到有限频率情形，建立频域下涨落、响应与耗散之间的统一理论框架。
AI.method: 针对过阻尼朗之万动力学和马尔可夫跳变过程两种系统，分别采用空间分解（朗之万系统）和边分解（马尔可夫跳变过程），将功率谱表示为同一频率下局部响应的二次型。
AI.result: 从同一恒等式推导出频域响应不确定性关系、动力学与热力学不确定性关系、平衡涨落-耗散定理及Harada-Sasa类关系；通过随机网络和驱动扩散系统的应用，展示了涨落谱的边贡献分解及频率依赖的涨落-响应-耗散权衡。
AI.conclusion: 该理论统一推广了静态非平衡涨落-响应关系到有限频率，揭示了频域中涨落、响应与耗散之间的内在联系和权衡。

title: Interaction-controlled localization in one-dimensional chain: From edges to domain walls
summary: Using Hartree-Fock mean-field approach, we study the role of on-site ($U$) and extended ($V$) Hubbard interactions on the existence and evolution of edge modes in a half-filled Su-Schrieffer-Heeger (SSH) chain. We analyze the energy spectrum, local probability amplitudes, and site-resolved charge and spin density profiles across topological, critical, and trivial hopping regimes. We find that the localization of bound states is controlled by the ratio $2V/U$, with edge spin-density-wave modes for $U>2V$ and mid-chain charge-density-wave domain walls for $U<2V$, independent of band topology. These results establish the correlation-driven origin of localized states in finite one-dimensional chains.

AI.tldr: 本文通过Hartree-Fock方法研究了一维SSH链中局域Hubbard相互作用(U)和扩展Hubbard相互作用(V)对边缘态的影响，发现局域态由2V/U比值控制，与能带拓扑无关。
AI.motivation: 探究关联相互作用（即U和V）对SSH链中边缘态存在与演化的具体影响，澄清拓扑与非拓扑机制在局域态形成中的角色。
AI.method: 采用Hartree-Fock平均场方法，分析半填充SSH链的能量谱、局域概率振幅及实空间电荷/自旋密度分布，涵盖拓扑、临界和平凡三种跳变区间。
AI.result: 局域态由2V/U比值决定：U>2V时出现边缘自旋密度波（SDW）模式，U<2V时出现链中电荷密度波（CDW）畴壁；该行为独立于能带拓扑。
AI.conclusion: 有限一维链中的局域态源于关联相互作用而非单纯拓扑效应，揭示了局域态形成的关联驱动起源。

title: Magnetic Brightening and Nanoscale Imaging of Spin-Polarized Helical Edge Modes
summary: Efficient sub-10 nm electric transport remains a major challenge for nanoelectronics due to high losses and impedance mismatches in conventional Drude metals. Despite their promise of dissipationless, reflection-free conduction, topologically protected chiral edge modes remain little explored in their nanoscale spin polarized transport-particularly regarding real-space visualization, magnetic field tunability, and high-frequency edge conductivity. Here, we report magnetic brightening and nanoscale visualization of highly spin-polarizable infrared helical edge states using cryogenic magneto-infrared scattering-type scanning near-field optical microscopy (cm-IR-sSNOM). Our measurements reveal magnetic field-induced near-field conductivity at step edges, uncovering quantum spin Hall spin-splitting modes with enhanced infrared polarizability and slightly narrowed near-field profiles. In addition, the infrared edge electrodynamic response scales nearly linearly with atomic layer number, providing compelling evidence that magnetic-field-induced gaps do not disrupt individual-layer edge states at energies of around 100 meV. These results sharply contrast with microwave and DC transport, where even small magnetically induced gaps decrease edge conduction. Magnetically tunable, topologically robust high-frequency edge modes open a pathway toward ultralow-loss nanoscale interconnects and quantum logic architectures for next-generation microelectronics, spintronics and quantum information science.

AI.tldr: 本文利用低温磁红外散射型扫描近场光学显微镜（cm-IR-sSNOM）首次实现了对拓扑保护的量子自旋霍尔边缘态在红外频率下的实空间可视化与磁调控，发现边缘态的红外电导率随原子层数线性增加，且磁场诱导的能隙（~100 meV）不会破坏单层边缘态，与微波和直流输运行为形成鲜明对比，为超低损耗纳米互连与量子逻辑架构开辟了新路径。
AI.motivation: 尽管拓扑保护的手性边缘模式理论上可实现无耗散、无反射的电荷传输，但其在纳米尺度的自旋极化输运特性——尤其是实空间可视化、磁场可调性以及高频边缘电导——仍鲜有探索，这制约了其在超低损耗纳米电子学中的应用。
AI.method: 采用低温磁红外散射型扫描近场光学显微镜（cm-IR-sSNOM），在红外频率下对量子自旋霍尔边缘态进行磁致亮化与实空间纳米级成像，分析磁场诱导的近场电导、自旋劈裂模式、红外极化率及近场轮廓变化。
AI.result: 成功实现了红外螺旋边缘态的高自旋极化成像，观察到磁场诱导的台阶边缘近场电导增强，揭示了量子自旋霍尔自旋劈裂模式，并发现红外边缘电动力学响应随原子层数近乎线性增长，表明~100 meV的磁诱导能隙不会破坏单层边缘态。
AI.conclusion: 磁可调、拓扑鲁棒的高频边缘模式为实现超低损耗纳米互连和量子逻辑架构提供了全新途径，对下一代微电子、自旋电子学和量子信息科学具有重要推动作用。

title: Thermodynamics of stacking faults and phase stability in cobalt alloys: A combined computational and experimental study
summary: Stacking fault energy dictates phase stability and deformation behavior in Co alloys and WC-Co cemented carbides, yet a quantitative assessment of alloying effects at finite temperatures remains poorly established. By integrating first-principles thermodynamics with microstructural characterization, we provide a rigorous evaluation of these influences across atomic and macroscopic scales. We show that stacking fault energetics at 0K for transition metal solutes are primarily governed by atomic misfit volume. While 4d and 5d elements follow a consistent linear trend, specific 3d solutes exhibit significant deviations due to non-negligible magnetic contributions. By incorporating phonon, electronic, longitudinal spin-fluctuation, and magnetic free-energy contributions, the model accurately captures the fcc-hcp transformation and quantifies how diverse solutes modulate the phase landscape. We demonstrate that V, Ni, Fe, Mo, and W lower the transformation temperature by stabilizing fcc phase, while Cr and C exhibit the opposite effect, consistent with experimental phase diagrams. Furthermore, microscopic analysis confirms that higher W content dissolved in the Co suppresses stacking-fault formation by elevating the stacking fault energy at finite temperatures. This work clarifies the physical mechanisms by which alloying regulates stacking fault energy and phase stability in Co-based systems, providing guidance for the design of Co-based alloys and WC-Co cemented carbides.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理热力学与微观表征相结合，系统评估了合金元素对Co基合金及WC-Co硬质合金中堆垛层错能的影响，揭示了原子错配体积和磁性贡献是关键因素，并量化了不同溶质对fcc-hcp相稳定性的调控机制。
AI.motivation: 堆垛层错能决定Co合金及WC-Co硬质合金的相稳定性和变形行为，但有限温度下合金化效应的定量评估尚不明确。
AI.method: 整合第一性原理热力学与微观结构表征，考虑声子、电子、纵向自旋涨落和磁自由能贡献，建立0K到有限温度下的堆垛层错能模型。
AI.result: 0K时过渡金属溶质的作用主要由原子错配体积主导；4d/5d元素呈线性趋势，3d元素因磁贡献存在显著偏差；V、Ni、Fe、Mo、W稳定fcc相并降低转变温度，Cr和C则相反；高温下W含量升高可抑制堆垛层错形成。
AI.conclusion: 阐明了合金元素调控Co基体系堆垛层错能和相稳定性的物理机制，为Co基合金及WC-Co硬质合金的设计提供指导。

title: Random sampling of self-avoiding theta-graphs
summary: Theta-graphs are a type of spatial graph with two vertices connected by three edges. We investigate embeddings of theta-graphs in the square and simple cubic lattices, using a combination of the Wang-Landau Monte Carlo method with a variant of the BFACF algorithm which accommodates vertices of degree 3. This allows us to estimate the critical exponents governing the number of theta-graphs and the distributions of the different arm-lengths. For the cubic lattice these values can be compared to the corresponding exponents for prime knots. We also study the number of `monodisperse' theta-graphs where the three arms have the same lengths, and find evidence supporting a conjecture for the critical exponent in two dimensions.

AI.tldr: 本文利用Wang-Landau Monte Carlo方法和改进的BFACF算法，研究了theta图在方形和简单立方晶格中的嵌入，估计了控制theta图数量和不同臂长分布的临界指数，并在二维中验证了关于临界指数的猜想。
AI.motivation: 研究theta图这类特殊空间图在晶格中的嵌入性质，特别是其临界指数，并与素数结的对应指数进行比较，以理解空间图与结之间的深层联系。
AI.method: 结合Wang-Landau Monte Carlo方法和一种改进的BFACF算法（可容纳度为3的顶点），对方形晶格和简单立方晶格中的theta图嵌入进行数值模拟和统计分析。
AI.result: 估计了theta图数量和不同臂长分布的临界指数；在立方晶格中，这些指数可与素数结的对应指数进行比较；对于"单分散"theta图（三臂等长），在二维中找到了支持临界指数猜想的证据。
AI.conclusion: 所采用的数值方法能有效研究theta图在晶格中的嵌入，获得的临界指数与素数结的指数具有可比性，并在二维中验证了关于单分散theta图临界指数的猜想。

title: Kink-kink correlations in nonlinear quenches across a quantum critical point
summary: When a quantum system exhibiting a second order phase transition is quenched across the critical point in large but finite time, the dynamics are not adiabatic in the critical region and the Kibble-Zurek (KZ) mechanism provides a framework to determine local observables such as the mean defect density. However, to find higher-point functions, one has to go beyond the KZ paradigm asshown in recent works on one-dimensional transverse field Ising model (TFIM) following a linear quench. It has been found that (i) besides the KZ scale, the quench dynamics depend on another length scale that arises due to the finite phase difference between the low energy modes, and (ii) contrary to the expectations based on the KZ mechanism, in general, the correlation functions do not decay exponentially with distance. Motivated by these results for the linear quench, we are interested in understanding if these properties are universal, and consider the 1D TFIM when the transverse field varies algebraically in the vicinity of the critical field. We focus on the equal-time,longitudinal kink-kink correlation function at the end of the quench from the paramagnetic to the ferromagnetic phase, and find that (i) the correlator depends only on the KZ length for superlinear quenches, otherwise an additional dephasing length is required to describe it, and (ii) the dephased correlator decays as a compressed exponential with an exponent that changes continuously with the quench exponent. Our results are obtained using an adiabatic perturbation theory, analytical arguments and exact numerical integration of the relevant equations.

AI.tldr: 论文研究了1D横场伊辛模型在代数形式的淬火下，纵向kink-kink关联函数的普适性行为，发现除了Kibble-Zurek标度外，还需要一个退相位长度来描述关联函数，且关联函数呈压缩指数衰减。
AI.motivation: 在线性淬火下，1D横场伊辛模型表现出超越KZ机制的额外长度尺度和非指数衰减的关联函数，本文旨在探究这些性质是否具有普适性，并将其推广到代数形式的淬火过程。
AI.method: 采用绝热微扰理论、解析推导以及精确数值积分相结合的方法，研究横场在临界点附近呈代数变化的1D TFIM模型中的kink-kink关联函数。
AI.result: (1) 超线性淬火下关联函数仅依赖KZ长度，否则需要额外的退相位长度；(2) 退相位后的关联函数呈压缩指数衰减，且指数随淬火指数连续变化。
AI.conclusion: 代数淬火下1D TFIM的非KZ行为具有普适性，但退相位长度和压缩指数衰减的依赖关系与淬火指数有关，丰富了KZ机制的理论框架。

title: Guidelines for band gap opening in graphene superlattices with periodic π-vacancy distribution
summary: Periodic $π$-vacancies in graphene superlattices (GSLs) provide a symmetry-based route to band-gap opening in graphene by modifying the $π$-band dispersion. However, the symmetry conditions that determine whether a vacancy motif can open a band gap remain unclear. Here, we investigate periodic $π$-vacancy GSLs using a nearest-neighbor tight-binding model with one $p_z$ orbital per carbon site to identify the symmetry requirements for gap opening. $π$-vacancies, representing functionalized, substituted, or missing carbon sites, are modeled as site deletions in the $π$ basis, with all hopping matrix elements to and from the deleted sites set to zero. We focus on $π$-vacancy motifs with $C_2$ and $C_3$ point-group symmetry. A $3n \times 3n$ GSL, where $n=1,2,3,\ldots$ is the integer scaling factor multiplying the honeycomb primitive-cell vectors, folds $K$ and $K'$ to $Γ$ and can therefore open a band gap. For $C_3$-type vacancies, the Dirac cones remain pinned at high-symmetry points and thus stay at $Γ$ in folded $3n$ GSLs. In contrast, $C_2$-type vacancies that reduce the global point group of the GSL to $D_{2h}$ by preserving a pair of perpendicular mirror symmetries, $σ_v \perp σ_d$, can also constrain the Dirac cones to $Γ$. When the $σ_v$ and $σ_d$ mirror planes are absent, the cones are allowed to shift away from $Γ$ to $(\pm Δq,\pm Δq)$ in the $3n$ superlattice.

AI.tldr: 本文研究石墨烯超晶格中周期性π空位对称性对带隙打开的影响，发现C₃型空位和保持特定镜面对称的C₂型空位可将狄拉克锥约束在Γ点从而打开带隙，而缺失镜面对称的C₂型空位则允许狄拉克锥偏离Γ点。
AI.motivation: 周期性π空位可以通过对称性在石墨烯中打开带隙，但决定空位构型能否打开带隙的对称条件尚不清楚，作者希望澄清这一机制。
AI.method: 采用最近邻紧束缚模型（每个碳原子一个pz轨道），将π空位（包括功能化、取代或缺失碳位点）建模为删除π基中的位点，并将所有与该删除位点相关的跃迁矩阵元设为零。聚焦于具有C₂和C₃点群对称性的π空位构型。
AI.result: 1) 3n×3n超晶格可将K和K'点折叠到Γ点从而打开带隙；2) C₃型空位的狄拉克锥被钉扎在高对称点，在折叠后的3n超晶格中仍位于Γ点；3) 保持一对垂直镜面σ_v⊥σ_d的C₂型空位（全局点群降为D₂h）也能将狄拉克锥约束在Γ点；4) 缺失这些镜面对称的C₂型空位允许狄拉克锥移离Γ点到(±Δq,±Δq)。
AI.conclusion: 明确了π空位石墨烯超晶格中带隙打开的对称性条件：C₃对称性和特定的镜面对称性（σ_v⊥σ_d）是约束狄拉克锥到Γ点从而打开带隙的关键因素。

title: Unveiling the Atomistic Mechanisms of Shear-Induced LDA$\leftrightarrow$HDA Transformations and Shear Banding in Amorphous Silicon under High Pressures
summary: Large-scale molecular dynamics simulations of shear deformation under constant pressures of amorphous silicon, PT from low-density-amorphous (LDA) to high-density-amorphous (HDA) Si, and formation of shear bands (SBs) are performed using the state-of-the-art Gaussian Approximation Potential. The simulations reveal that LDA$\leftrightarrow$HDA shear-induced PTs occur simultaneously until reaching steady state. The developed mechanism-based analytical model well describes shear-strain-governed kinetics and steady states at all pressures, independent of shear stresses. Shear reduces the pressure for initiation and completion of LDA$\rightarrow$HDA PT by $4.36$ and $5.10$ GPa, respectively. Without PT at low pressure, shear-banding occurs, which is partially suppressed by PT at higher pressure with uniform deformation-PT at $9.8$ GPa. Despite the much larger shear and expected fraction of HDA, surprising sharp drop in the HDA atomic fraction within the SB was discovered. In bulk, Si deforms by atomic rearrangement in localized shear transformation zones with high nonaffine displacements, which trigger nucleation of HDA clusters within LDA and, concurrently, of LDA clusters within HDA, without growth and coalescence. In SB, a turbulent-like flow with swirls is revealed, which promotes reverse PT from HDA$\rightarrow$LDA more effectively. Transformation-induced plasticity in amorphous Si is revealed. The findings open up basic research into the mechanisms and kinetics of plastic strain-induced PTs in amorphous materials under high pressure, with numerous important applications.

AI.tldr: 本文通过大规模分子动力学模拟，研究了非晶硅在剪切变形下的LDA↔HDA可逆相变和剪切带形成机制。发现剪切作用可降低相变压力，相变会抑制剪切带形成，而剪切带内的湍流-like流动会促进HDA→LDA逆相变，导致HDA原子分数异常下降。
AI.motivation: 目前对非晶材料在高压剪切变形下的相变机制和动力学理解不足，尤其是剪切诱导相变与剪切带形成之间的相互作用尚不清楚。
AI.method: 采用高斯近似势（GAP）进行大规模分子动力学模拟，结合机制分析模型描述剪切应变控制的动力学和稳态行为。
AI.result: 剪切将LDA→HDA相变起始和完成压力分别降低4.36和5.10 GPa；相变抑制剪切带形成；剪切带内HDA原子分数异常下降；发现湍流-like流动促进逆相变；揭示相变诱导塑性现象。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为理解非晶材料中塑性应变诱导相变的机制和动力学提供了新见解，对高压下非晶材料的应用具有重要意义。

title: Microscopic evidence for imaginary charge density wave in a kagome metal
summary: Dissipationless charge transport without any energy loss is one of the most fascinating phenomena in condensed matter physics. This extraordinary state manifests in two well-established systems: superconductors and quantum Hall systems. A proposed third category is associated with chiral loop current order, characterized by the spontaneous formation of microscopic electric current loops. The microscopic origin of these currents stems from imaginary hopping terms, conceptualized as an imaginary charge density wave (iCDW). Despite extensive investigations, its existence remains highly controversial. Here we report site-selective spectroscopic evidence for a pure iCDW in the kagome nonmagnetic metal CsV$_3$Sb$_5$. Nuclear quadrupole resonance spectra at out-of-plane $^{121}$Sb site sensitive to in-plane currents reveal anomalous broadening below $T^*\approx$120 K, coinciding with the nematic transition well above the real charge density wave (CDW). Under magnetic fields, the spectra exhibit asymmetric lineshapes, demonstrating that this broadening purely originates from magnetic effects rather than from electric quadrupolar effects associated with CDW fluctuations. The observed lineshapes are quantitatively consistent with ~1 mT local fields induced by chiral loop currents, indicating spontaneous time-reversal symmetry breaking. This microscopic identification of the long-sought pure iCDW establishes a novel form of quantum order, potentially revolutionizing our understanding of exotic electronic states in quantum materials.

AI.tldr: 本文在Kagome非磁性金属CsV₃Sb₅中，通过核四极共振谱学提供了纯手性循环电流序（iCDW）的位点选择性光谱证据，证明其自发时间反演对称性破缺，确立了一种新型量子序。
AI.motivation: 无耗散电荷输运是凝聚态物理中最迷人的现象之一，除超导和量子霍尔系统外，手性循环电流序被认为是第三类候选系统，但其存在性长期存在争议。本文旨在提供该序存在的明确实验证据。
AI.method: 利用面外¹²¹Sb位点的核四极共振谱，探测面内电流敏感的谱线展宽；通过外加磁场下的非对称线形分析，区分磁效应与电四极效应；定量拟合局域磁场~1 mT，验证手性循环电流的存在。
AI.result: 在T*≈120 K（向列相转变温度，高于实电荷密度波）以下观察到反常谱线展宽；磁场下非对称线形表明展宽纯源于磁效应而非CDW涨落的电四极效应；实验线形与~1 mT局域场的定量预测一致，证实自发时间反演对称性破缺。
AI.conclusion: 首次微观识别了长期寻求的纯iCDW，确立了一种新型量子序，有望革新对量子材料中奇异电子态的理解。

title: Lattice Tadpoles
summary: We prove several rigorous results about the asymptotic behaviour of the numbers of tadpoles (or lassos) embedded in a lattice, including cases where the head is subject to a constraint like being unknotted, or where the tail pierces the surface spanned by the head.

AI.tldr: 本文对格子中蝌蚪（套索）嵌入数量的渐近行为进行了严格分析，涵盖了头部受约束（如不打结）或尾部穿过头部所张曲面等情况。
AI.motivation: 理解蝌蚪（套索）在格子中嵌入数量的渐近行为，特别是当头部受到约束（如不打结）或尾部穿过头部所张曲面时的复杂情况。
AI.method: 采用严格的数学证明方法，对格子中蝌蚪嵌入数量的渐近行为进行分析。
AI.result: 证明了关于蝌蚪嵌入数量渐近行为的若干严格结果，涵盖了头部受约束和尾部穿过曲面等情形。
AI.conclusion: 为理解蝌蚪（套索）在格子中的嵌入计数问题提供了严格的数学基础，特别是在约束条件下的行为分析。

title: Sculpting Spin-Wave Landscapes via Curvature of 2D Magnonic Crystals
summary: Engineering the dispersion relation is one of the key ingredients enabling the application of spin waves in computational elements. One way to engineer the spin-wave band structure is to create an artificial magnonic crystal, which can be used to design specific band gaps or dispersion branches. However, creating a two-dimensional magnonic crystal usually requires removing material, which dramatically decreases the decay lengths of spin waves. Here, we present a method to manipulate the demagnetizing field landscape by utilizing large-area curvilinear nanotemplates consisting of three-dimensional nanopyramids arranged in a square lattice with a period of 400 nm. In a 50-nm-thick Permalloy film grown on these curvilinear templates, we experimentally observe a complete in-plane band gap together with flat-band modes that exhibit strong real-space localization of the spin waves in the pyramid valleys. Micro-focused Brillouin light scattering measurements corroborate the numerically predicted dispersion and reveal the possibility of opening and closing this gap by varying the external magnetic field. Our results establish three-dimensional-templated continuous films as a versatile platform for two-dimensional signal processing and magnonic computing elements.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用三维纳米金字塔曲面模板制备连续坡莫合金薄膜，在二维平面内实现完整的自旋波带隙和局域化平带模式，并通过外磁场调控带隙的开闭，为基于自旋波的信号处理和磁子计算提供了新平台。
AI.motivation: 传统二维磁子晶体通常需要去除材料，这会显著降低自旋波的衰减长度。本文旨在通过曲面纳米模板调控退磁场分布，在无需去除材料的前提下实现可调控的能带结构。
AI.method: 在周期为400 nm的三维纳米金字塔阵列模板上沉积50 nm厚的坡莫合金薄膜，形成连续曲面薄膜；利用微聚焦布里渊光散射（μ-BLS）测量自旋波色散关系，并与数值模拟结果进行对比验证。
AI.result: 实验观测到完整的平面内带隙以及具有强实空间局域化的平带模式（自旋波局域在金字塔谷底）；通过改变外磁场可实现带隙的开闭调控。
AI.conclusion: 三维模板化连续薄膜可作为二维信号处理和磁子计算元件的多功能平台，为设计低损耗、可调控的磁子晶体提供了新思路。

title: Dielectric, magnetic, and magnetodielectric behaviors of BaFe12O19 hexaferrite modulated by Mn and Ti substitutions
comment: 29 pages, 13 figures, Under review for publication in Journal of Alloys and Compounds
summary: We prepared Mn- and Ti mono-doped and co-doped BaFe12O19 hexaferrites via solid-state reaction. Mn ions preferentially occupy the 4f2 and 2b sites, while Ti ions mainly substitute the Fe3+ ions at 4f1 and 12k sites as revealed by the Raman spectroscopy and formation energy. Pure BaFe12O19 exhibits ferrimagnetism. The hexaferrites related to Ti doping have noncollinear longitudinal conical spin order at low temperatures, where BaFe6Mn3Ti3O19 retains this spin order up to room temperature. Ti4+ substitution at 4f1 and 12k sites plays a pivotal role in stabilizing the noncollinear conical spin order through adjusting the superexchange interactions and reducing the uniaxial magnetocrystalline anisotropy along the c-axis. The magnetic response exhibits two distinct transition temperatures because Ti4+ ions interrupt the magnetic superexchange interactions with two inequivalent exchange integrals. Pure BaFe12O19 presents a quantum paraelectric behavior at low temperatures, which is disrupted by Mn-Ti doping due to the decoupling of electric dipoles within the triangular bipyramid. Electron hopping and polaronic effects dominate the dielectric response at 10 - 50 K, while Maxwell-Wagner interfacial polarization and electron hopping contribute to dielectric dispersion at higher temperatures. The negative MD effect of pure BaFe12O19 and BaFe6Mn3Ti3O19 at 10 K originates from spin-phonon coupling and electric polarization induced by noncollinear spin order under magnetic field, respectively. The Mn-Ti co-doped samples achieve relatively higher MD responses at low magnetic fields. In higher temperatures, the MD effect arises mainly from the magnetic field modulation of the electron hopping with non-intrinsic interfacial polarization. This research reveals the physical properties of M-type hexaferrite can be modulated through substituting Fe3+ ions at different sites.

AI.tldr: 本文通过固相反应制备了Mn和Ti单掺杂及共掺杂的BaFe12O19六角铁氧体，研究了其晶体结构、磁序、介电及磁介电效应。研究发现，Ti掺杂能稳定非共线锥形自旋有序至室温，Mn-Ti共掺杂破坏了量子顺电行为并增强了低场下的磁介电响应。不同Fe位取代可有效调控M型六角铁氧体的物理性质。
AI.motivation: 探索通过不同位点（4f2, 2b, 4f1, 12k）的Fe³⁺离子取代（Mn和Ti掺杂）来调控M型六角铁氧体（BaFe12O19）的磁结构、介电和磁介电特性，揭示其微观机制。
AI.method: 采用固相反应法制备BaFe12O19的Mn/Ti单掺杂及共掺杂样品；利用拉曼光谱和形成能计算确定离子占位；通过磁性测量、介电谱和磁介电（MD）测试分析其物理性质。
AI.result: Mn优先占据4f2和2b位，Ti主要取代4f1和12k位；Ti掺杂诱导非共线纵向锥形自旋有序，且BaFe6Mn3Ti3O19可保持该有序至室温；纯样品为量子顺电，Mn-Ti掺杂破坏了该行为；低场下共掺杂样品表现出更高的磁介电响应。
AI.conclusion: 通过在不同Fe位进行离子取代，可以有效调控M型六角铁氧体的磁序、介电和磁介电性能，为多铁性材料的性能优化提供了可行路径。

title: Dynamical correlations in a dissipative XXZ spin chain
summary: We study dynamical spin correlations in a dissipative XXZ spin chain subject to uniform local spin-loss and pumping. Starting from a mixed steady state that is featureless albeit possessing finite magnetization, rich dynamics emerges in time-dependent two-point correlators evaluated on top of it. For unitary evolution in which the reservoir is absent, the longitudinal correlators reproduce the established hierarchy of spin-transport universality classes - ballistic, Kardar-Parisi-Zhang (KPZ) superdiffusive, and diffusive - across the phase diagram. However, for finite magnetization, additional ballistic light cone propagation gets superimposed on the previous universality classes, arising from magnon propagation.The transverse correlator displays very fast, exponential decay of correlations without wavefront propagation in the easy-plane case. At the isotropic point, it follows KPZ scaling due to $SU(2)$ symmetry, while in the easy-axis regime, it is characterized by ballistic spreading of correlations. Under full Lindbladian dynamics, the universality classes are preserved at early times, while the correlations acquire an overall exponential damping in the long-time limit. In terms of methods, we have used vectorized TEBD for numerical simulations and exact analytical results obtained via a Pfaffian representation and the third-quantization framework for the noninteracting XX case.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了耗散XXZ自旋链中的动力学自旋关联，发现纵向关联函数呈现弹道、KPZ超扩散和扩散等输运普适类，而横向关联函数在不同各向异性区域表现出不同行为；在有限林布利安动力学下，早期保留普适类，后期整体指数衰减。
AI.motivation: 理解和分类开放量子多体系统中自旋输运的普适性行为，特别是耗散（自旋损失与泵浦）对动力学关联函数的影响。
AI.method: 使用向量化TEBD进行数值模拟，针对可积XX情况通过Pfaffian表示和第三量子化框架获得精确解析结果。
AI.result: 纵向关联在无耗散时复现弹道、KPZ超扩散、扩散三种普适类；有限磁化下叠加额外弹道光锥传播。横向关联：易平面区指数衰减无波前传播；各向同性点SU(2)对称性导致KPZ标度；易轴区弹道传播。全林布利安动力学下早期保留普适类，长期整体指数衰减。
AI.conclusion: 耗散不影响早期输运普适类但引入长期指数衰减，不同自旋分量对耗散响应不同，为开放量子系统自旋输运提供了完整图景。

title: Singular Behavior of Observables at Hopf Bifurcations
summary: Hopf bifurcations are a universal route to self-sustained oscillations in driven systems. Despite the absence of any singular stationary state, we show that time-averaged observables generically exhibit singularities at the onset of oscillations. The origin of this behavior is geometric: phase averaging over the emergent periodic attractor eliminates odd powers of the oscillation amplitude, while the squared amplitude varies smoothly with the distance from the bifurcation. Consequently, the excess of any smooth time-averaged observable admits an integer-power expansion; observables remain finite but display discontinuities in finite-order derivatives. This yields an Ehrenfest-like hierarchy of Hopf singularities, in which the first nonanalytic derivative is determined by the lowest-order coupling between the observable and the limit-cycle waveform that survives phase averaging. Generic observables therefore exhibit kink singularities, while symmetry or geometric cancellations can suppress lower-order couplings and shift nonanalyticity to higher derivatives. We demonstrate this mechanism in chemical, electronic, and climate oscillators. Our results identify supercritical Hopf bifurcations as a universal mechanism for nonanalytic observable behavior, where singular features arise without any underlying singular stationary state. They thus provide a generic setting for singular behavior without divergence.

AI.tldr: 本文发现，即使不存在奇异的稳态，超临界Hopf分岔在时间平均可观测量的导数中也会产生奇异性。这种非解析行为源于相位平均消除振幅奇次幂的几何效应，形成类似Ehrenfest阶层的奇异性层级结构。化学、电子和气候振荡器中的实验验证了这一普适机制。
AI.motivation: 传统观点认为Hopf分岔作为自持振荡的普适路径，其时间平均可观测量应为光滑的。作者试图揭示在无奇异稳态的情况下，时间平均可观测量仍可表现出奇异性，挑战了对分岔现象中可观测行为光滑性的既有认知。
AI.method: 通过几何分析证明：相位平均消除振幅奇次幂，而振幅平方随分岔参数光滑变化，因此任意时间平均可观测量的增量可展开为整数幂级数；第一个非解析导数由可观测量与极限环波形的耦合项中首个经相位平均后非零的阶数决定。
AI.result: 揭示Hopf分岔产生一种Ehrenfest阶层式的奇异性层级：一般可观测量表现为扭结奇异性（一阶导数不连续），而对称性或几何抵消可推迟非解析性至更高阶导数。在化学振荡、电子电路和气候系统的实验中验证了该机制。
AI.conclusion: 超临界Hopf分岔是时间平均可观测量中非解析行为的普适机制，奇异特征可在无发散的情况下出现，为无发散的奇异行为提供了通用框架，对理解驱动系统中自持振荡起始点的可观测突变具有重要意义。

title: Field-induced asymmetric band flattening and ideal quantum geometry in rhombohedral graphene
summary: Rhombohedral graphene exhibits an exceptionally diverse array of correlated phases that depend sensitively on the displacement field. Compiling reported phases into a unified phase diagram reveals a pronounced field-dependent electron-hole asymmetry: correlated states on the hole-doped side emerge at small displacement fields, whereas the fractional quantum anomalous Hall effect (FQAHE) is observed exclusively on the electron-doped side under large displacement fields. This stark asymmetry highlights the need to understand how flat bands evolve with displacement fields. Here, we directly visualize the field-induced electron-hole asymmetric band flattening in rhombohedral pentalayer graphene (R5G) using nanospot angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy with electrostatic gating. Beyond gap opening and spectral weight redistribution indicative of layer polarization, the gating field drives a strongly asymmetric modification of the flat bands: the flat valence band (FVB) evolves into an M-shaped dispersion at high field, whereas the flat conduction band (FCB) progressively flattens with increasing field. Comparison with calculations identifies critical parameters governing the band curvature of R5G, from which the resulting finite Berry curvature and near-ideal quantum geometry support the emergence of topological phases under electron doping at large fields. These results establish a direct link between the asymmetric phase diagram, band structure evolution, and quantum geometry, providing a microscopic framework for understanding correlated and topological phases in rhombohedral graphene.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过纳米角分辨光电子能谱直接观测了菱方五层石墨烯在位移场下的能带演化，发现电子-空穴不对称的能带平坦化：空穴侧在弱场下出现关联态，而电子侧在强场下实现分数陈量子反常霍尔效应，并建立了相图、能带结构与量子几何之间的直接联系。
AI.motivation: 菱方石墨烯中观测到依赖位移场的丰富关联相，但电子-空穴掺杂侧表现出显著不对称性（空穴侧弱场出现关联态，电子侧强场出现FQAHE），这种不对称性的微观起源尚不清楚，需要理解平带如何随位移场演化。
AI.method: 采用纳米角分辨光电子能谱并结合静电门控技术，直接可视化菱方五层石墨烯在位移场下的能带结构变化。
AI.result: 发现门控电场驱动了强烈的不对称能带平坦化：价带平带在高场下演变为M形色散，而导带平带则随场增强持续变平。结合理论计算，确定了控制能带曲率的关键参数，推导出有限贝里曲率和近理想量子几何支撑电子侧大场下拓扑相的出现。
AI.conclusion: 建立了不对称相图、能带结构演化与量子几何之间的直接联系，为理解菱方石墨烯中的关联相和拓扑相提供了微观框架。

title: Effective long-range attraction of moiré excitons under the influence of atomic reconstructions and anisotropic screening
summary: The moiré pattern, which emerges due to a relative rotation between two monolayers of transition metal dichalcogenides, features a long lattice period for small twist angles. The resulting band structure modulation acts as an effective potential for interlayer excitons (IXs), which can realize correlated many-body phenomena. Here, we aim for a material-realistic modelling of the exciton-exciton interaction, taking into account lattice reconstructions and an exciton-exciton potential that incorporates the highly anisotropic screening imposed by the two-dimensional bilayer and the dielectric background. We find strong modifications of the on-site interaction induced by the change of the moiré potential during lattice reconstructions, while for long-range interactions on the length scale of the moiré period, anisotropic dielectric screening leads to a crossover from a repulsive to an attractive interaction. The interaction potential and hopping amplitudes serve as parameters for a Bose-Hubbard model on the moiré lattice, which we use to explain correlated behavior of interlayer excitons.

AI.tldr: 本文通过材料真实建模研究了过渡金属二硫族化物双层中莫尔纹图案对层间激子相互作用的影响，发现晶格重构会显著改变莫尔势场并影响激子位点内相互作用，而各向异性介电屏蔽导致长程相互作用从排斥转变为吸引，最终将相互作用势与跳跃振幅作为参数构建了莫尔晶格上的Bose-Hubbard模型来解释层间激子的关联行为。
AI.motivation: 旨在对层间激子-激子相互作用进行材料真实建模，考虑晶格重构和由二维双层及介电背景带来的高度各向异性屏蔽效应，从而准确描述莫尔超晶格中激子的关联多体现象。
AI.method: 1. 考虑晶格重构对莫尔势场的修正；2. 引入考虑各向异性介电屏蔽的激子-激子相互作用势；3. 计算位点内和长程相互作用修正；4. 提取相互作用势和跳跃振幅作为参数，构建莫尔晶格上的Bose-Hubbard模型。
AI.result: 晶格重构导致的莫尔势场变化显著改变了位点内相互作用强度；各向异性介电屏蔽使长程相互作用在莫尔周期尺度上出现从排斥到吸引的交叉行为。
AI.conclusion: 构建的Bose-Hubbard模型参数可用于解释层间激子的关联行为，为理解莫尔超晶格中激子的多体物理提供了理论框架。

title: Frustrated magnetic order in hybrid Kitaev spin-orbital models
summary: Spin-orbital generalization of Kitaev model provides a robust extension to the original Kitaev model. However, real materials often exhibit competing interactions that break exact solvability which can give rise to new phases. Motivated by recent microscopic proposals of coexisting Yao-Lee and Kitaev couplings, we investigate the fate of the ground state when two independent exactly solvable spin liquid Hamiltonians each originally formulated on different lattice geometries are combined on a common lattice environment. We first focus on the hybrid Kitaev's honeycomb and square-lattice model. Using self-consistent mean-field analysis and perturbative calculation, we show that the strong-Kitaev regime yields magnetic order in the spin sector, while the orbital sector retains its topological order. We further analyze the hybridization of the Yao-Lee and square-lattice models and find that the model exhibits a rich evolution of Majorana Dirac bands and Lifshitz transitions. Remarkably, when the Yao-Lee and square-lattice couplings are equal and opposite, the model restores its exact solvability with a single itinerant Majorana flavor. These results demonstrate that hybrid spin liquid platforms may host various emergent phases beyond conventional exactly solvable limits.

AI.tldr: 本文将两个原本定义在不同晶格上的可精确求解的自旋液体哈密顿量（Kitaev模型和Yao-Lee模型）与方格模型混合，研究了混合自旋液体平台的新奇基态相。结果表明在强Kitaev耦合区域，自旋部分出现磁序而轨道部分保持拓扑序；在Yao-Lee与方格耦合相等相反时恢复精确可解性。
AI.motivation: 真实材料中常存在竞争相互作用，破坏原始Kitaev模型的精确可解性，从而可能涌现出新奇量子相。作者受共存的Yao-Lee和Kitaev耦合的微观提议启发，探究将两个独立可解的自旋液体哈密顿量结合在同一晶格环境中的基态命运。
AI.method: 采用自洽平均场分析和微扰计算方法，分别研究了Kitaev蜂巢模型与方格模型的混合，以及Yao-Lee模型与方格模型的混合。
AI.result: 1) 强Kitaev区域：自旋部分出现磁有序，轨道部分保持拓扑序；2) Yao-Lee与方格混合模型展现丰富的Majorana狄拉克带演化及Lifshitz相变；3) 当Yao-Lee与方格耦合大小相等、符号相反时，模型恢复精确可解性，且只有一种巡游Majorana费米子。
AI.conclusion: 混合自旋液体平台可以承载超越传统精确可解极限的多种涌现量子相，为探索新奇自旋液体相提供了新途径。

title: Mixed-Parity Altermagnetism in Collinear Spin-Orbital Magnets
summary: Altermagnetism has so far mainly been understood in its even- and odd-parity forms. We show that collinear antiferromagnets with zero net magnetization can also host mixed-parity spin splitting, namely neither purely even nor purely odd in momentum. We identify the symmetry conditions for such mixed-parity altermagnetism and show that, in two dimensions, it can arise in spin-orbital magnets when the two antiparallel spin sectors are related by a single mirror symmetry. Using a two-sublattice two-orbital model, we demonstrate that circularly polarized light induces mixed-parity altermagnetism at finite staggered potential and odd-parity spin-orbital altermagnetism at zero staggered potential. Mixed-parity altermagnetism thereby emerges as the intermediate spin-split regime between even- and odd-parity altermagnetism when spin splitting and zero net magnetization are maintained. Spin-resolved orbital Edelstein effects provide a complementary electrical probe of the underlying spin-orbital order.

AI.tldr: 本文发现了一种新型的混合宇称交变磁性（mixed-parity altermagnetism），介于偶宇称和奇宇称交变磁性之间，出现在零净磁化的共线反铁磁体中，并可通过圆偏振光在自旋-轨道模型中实现。
AI.motivation: 传统交变磁性仅被理解为偶宇称或奇宇称形式，作者试图探索是否存在混合宇称（既非纯偶也非纯奇）的自旋劈裂形式，拓展交变磁性的理论框架。
AI.method: 通过对称性分析识别混合宇称交变磁性的必要条件（二维中需两个自旋反向扇区由单一镜面对称性关联），并利用两子格两轨道模型，结合圆偏振光激发与交错势调控，系统研究不同宇称交变磁性的转变。
AI.result: 圆偏振光在有限交错势下诱导混合宇称交变磁性，在零交错势下诱导奇宇称自旋-轨道交变磁性；混合宇称是偶宇称与奇宇称之间的中间自旋劈裂态，且自旋分辨的轨道Edelstein效应可作为电学探针。
AI.conclusion: 混合宇称交变磁性是交变磁性家族的新成员，丰富了零净磁化反铁磁体中的自旋劈裂类型，为自旋电子学提供了新的调控机制和探测手段。

title: Plastic deformation of B19' martensite where -- where it matters in NiTi technology
comment: 66 pages, 30 figures, accepted in journal Shape Memory and Superelasticity, May 2026
summary: Nitinol technology, besides utilizing the functional thermomechanical properties derived from the B2 cubic to B19' monoclinic martensitic transformation, also exploits the excellent plastic deformability of NiTi in the martensite state. It originates from the unique mechanism of plastic deformation of the B19' martensite by kwinking involving dislocation slip based kinking assisted by deformation twinning. Although the mechanism of plastic deformation of martensite by kwinking was revealed only very recently, various unusual phenomena that can only be rationalized by kwinking, have been reported in literature in the last 50 years. These phenomena include: 1) cold working with a high degree of reduction without introducing cracks, 2) excellent plastic deformability in the martensite state (plastic deformation up to~80% strain at stresses >1GPa), 3) refinement of austenitic microstructure to a quasi-amorphous state by tensile deformation, 4) observation of high density of {114} deformation bands in austenitic microstructures, 5) systematic ruptures of strengthened NiTi wires in tensile tests via necking at the onset of plastic yielding, 6) localized plastic deformation in tensile tests via propagation of Lüders band fronts with very large localized strain (~40%), 7) unusually long upper stress plateaus in superelastic tensile tests (>8% strain), 8) large plastic strains (> 20 %) generated in a single closed-loop cooling/heating cycle under constant stress, 9) shape setting of already annealed NiTi by heating under external constraint. Finally, we discuss how kwinking deformation was considered in constitutive modelling of thermomechanical behaviors of NiTi and, particularly, what is the role of the kwinking deformation in NiTi technology.

AI.tldr: 本文总结了NiTi合金马氏体相中一种独特的塑性变形机制——kwinking（由位错滑移引起的扭结变形，辅以变形孪晶），并列举了50年来文献中报道的9种只能用kwinking解释的异常现象，最后讨论了该机制在热力学本构建模及NiTi技术中的应用。
AI.motivation: 虽然kwinking机制最近才被揭示，但过去50年已有大量无法用传统理论解释的实验现象。本文旨在系统梳理这些现象，阐明kwinking在NiTi合金塑性变形中的核心作用，并推动其纳入技术应用和理论建模。
AI.method: 通过文献回顾，归纳9类与kwinking相关的异常实验现象（如大压下量冷加工、>80%塑性应变、准无定形态组织演变、Lüders带传播、超长应力平台等），并分析这些现象与kwinking机制的内在关联。
AI.result: 明确了kwinking是解释NiTi马氏体优异塑性成形能力的关键机制，覆盖从冷加工、高应变变形到形状设定、超弹性行为等多个技术领域。
AI.conclusion: kwinking变形机制对NiTi技术至关重要，应纳入本构模型以准确预测其热力学行为，并为新型加工工艺设计提供理论基础。

title: Dynamical pseudopotentials
summary: Pseudopotential theory has greatly driven first-principles calculations in materials, replacing the explicit treatment of the chemically inert core electrons with an effective potential acting only on the valence states. This is inherently an embedding problem, where tracing out the core electrons can be formulated in terms of a dynamical embedding potential. Motivated by this perspective, we first introduce a framework for dynamical (i.e., energy-dependent) pseudopotentials, showing how this leads to generalized norm-conservation conditions. Then, adopting a sum-over-poles representation, we disentangle the number of reference energies from the number of projectors; this allows to reproduce all-electron scattering at many reference energies with great accuracy and over very extended energy ranges. We further show that these pseudopotentials enter naturally into many-body total energy functionals, leading for the first time to a consistent and unified treatment of the all-electron atom, the pseudo-atom, and the solid within the same electronic-structure theory.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于动力学（能量依赖）赝势的新框架，通过引入求和-极点表示，将参考能量数与投影仪数解耦，从而在极宽能量范围内高精度重现全电子散射行为，并首次在统一的多体总能泛函框架下一致地处理全电子原子、赝原子和固体。
AI.motivation: 传统赝势理论在处理核心电子时存在局限，且缺乏统一的嵌入视角。本文旨在从动力学嵌入势的视角出发，建立更精确、更普适的赝势理论，并解决赝势与多体总能泛函之间的一致性问题。
AI.method: 首先从嵌入问题出发，将核心电子的消除形式化为动力学嵌入势，提出能量依赖的赝势框架并导出广义模守恒条件；随后采用求和-极点表示，实现参考能量数与投影仪数的解耦，以提升对多能量点散射行为的拟合精度和能量范围。
AI.result: 该动力学赝势能在极宽的能量范围内以高精度重现全电子散射行为；且能自然地嵌入多体总能泛函中，首次实现了全电子原子、赝原子和固体在同一电子结构理论下的一致处理。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的动力学赝势框架在精度和一致性上优于传统方法，为第一性原理计算提供了更强大、更统一的工具，尤其对需要宽能量范围或考虑多体效应的场景有重要价值。

title: Regulating oxygen content and superconductivity in La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_{7+δ}$
summary: The synthesis of high-quality Ruddlesden-Popper (RP) nickelates remains challenging due to variations in oxygen content and the prevalence of intergrown RP phases.
